commands.review_summary:
The PR broadens the dependency guard workflow token to content write and adds same-repository autoscrub logic that restores lockfile-only changes from the base tree, updates labels/comments, and covers the behavior with script and workflow tests.

PR surface: Tests +123, Config 0, Other +208. Total +331 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a maintainer automation feature, not a reported runtime bug. Source inspection shows current main blocks dependency graph changes but has no autoscrub path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human secops/maintainer review is needed because the patch intentionally broadens a pull_request_target token and adds branch-mutating automation; no narrow repair is identified.

target.title: feat: autoscrub accidental dependency lockfile changes
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds deterministic autoscrubbing for package lockfile-only PR residue when the PR branch is in the main OpenClaw repository and the workflow token can push the cleanup commit.
- Restores only changed package lockfiles from the PR base tree using the Git data API, then creates one narrow commit: `Remove dependency lockfile change`.
- Skips autoscrub for fork PRs instead of attempting an uncertain push, and posts the blocking comment with the exact manual next step.
- Skips autoscrub when any changed `package.json` modifies `dependencies` or `devDependencies`, because restoring lockfiles could break frozen installs or dependency semantics.

## User-Facing Comments

This stacked PR adds one new success comment and expands the blocked comment:

- `Dependency lockfile changes were removed`: posted after a successful autoscrub commit, listing restored lockfiles, target branch, and cleanup commit SHA.
- `Dependency graph changes are blocked`: now explains whether autoscrub was not attempted for a fork branch, skipped because dependency fields changed, or attempted but rejected by GitHub.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/dependency-change-awareness-workflow.test.ts test/scripts/dependency-change-awareness-script.test.ts`
- `git diff --check -- .github/workflows/dependency-change-awareness.yml scripts/github/dependency-change-awareness.mjs test/scripts/dependency-change-awareness-workflow.test.ts test/scripts/dependency-change-awareness-script.test.ts`
